28 #include "ros/timer_manager.h"
29 #include "ros/internal_timer_manager.h"
30 
31 namespace ros
32 {
33 
34 static InternalTimerManagerPtr g_timer_manager;
35 
36 InternalTimerManagerPtr getInternalTimerManager()
37 {
38  return g_timer_manager;
39 }
40 
41 void initInternalTimerManager()
42 {
43  if (!g_timer_manager)
44  {
45  g_timer_manager.reset(new InternalTimerManager);
46  }
47 }
48 
49 } // namespace ros
